item.title: Truth Social’s New AI Chatbot Is Donald Trump’s Media Diet Incarnate
item.description: Truth Search AI appears to rely heavily on conservative outlet Fox News to answer even the most basic questions.
item.media:keywords: artificial intelligence, algorithms, Social Media, chatbots, Donald Trump, Truth Social, politics
item.dc:creator: Guthrie Scrimgeour
item.dc:subject: Fox and Friends

item.title: The Vibes-Based Pricing of ‘Pro’ AI Software
item.description: In this episode of Uncanny Valley, we're talking about why some chatbot subscriptions are so expensive and how these premium prices were determined on vibes more than anything substantial.
item.media:keywords: Uncanny Valley Podcast, podcasts, artificial intelligence, chatbots, OpenAI, ChatGPT, Anthropic
item.dc:creator: Lauren Goode, Michael Calore, Reece Rogers
item.dc:subject: Uncanny Valley

item.title: Join Our Next Livestream: What GPT-5 Means for ChatGPT Users
item.description: On August 14, bring your questions about OpenAI's latest model, GPT-5, and what it means for the future of chatbots.
item.media:keywords: webinar, chatbots, artificial intelligence, OpenAI, ChatGPT
item.dc:creator: Reece Rogers
item.dc:subject: Livestream Q&A

item.title: OpenAI Finally Launched GPT-5. Here's Everything You Need to Know
item.description: OpenAI released GPT-5 on Thursday to both free users of ChatGPT and paying subscribers.
item.media:keywords: OpenAI, Sam Altman, ChatGPT, artificial intelligence
item.dc:creator: Kylie Robison
item.dc:subject: GPT-5

item.title: Age Verification Is Sweeping Gaming. Is It Ready for the Age of AI Fakes?
item.description: Discord users are already using video game characters to bypass the UK’s age-check laws. AI deepfakes could make things even more complicated.
item.media:keywords: artificial intelligence, video games, privacy, Discord
item.dc:creator: Megan Farokhmanesh
item.dc:subject: Fake ID

item.title: A Single Poisoned Document Could Leak ‘Secret’ Data Via ChatGPT
item.description: Security researchers found a weakness in OpenAI’s Connectors, which let you hook up ChatGPT to other services, that allowed them to extract data from a Google Drive without any user interaction.
item.media:keywords: artificial intelligence, cybersecurity, hacking, security, vulnerabilities, Google, OpenAI, ChatGPT, black hat, DefCon
item.dc:creator: Matt Burgess
item.dc:subject: Zero Click

item.title: Inside the US Government's Unpublished Report on AI Safety
item.description: The National Institute of Standards and Technology conducted a groundbreaking study on frontier models just before Donald Trump's second term as president—and never published the results.
item.media:keywords: AI Lab, Donald Trump, National Affairs, politics, Silicon Valley, artificial intelligence
item.dc:creator: Will Knight
item.dc:subject: AI Lab

item.title: OpenAI Announces Massive US Government Partnership
item.description: The ChatGPT maker is providing its frontier AI models to federal agencies for $1 for the next year.
item.media:keywords: OpenAI, ChatGPT, Sam Altman, Donald Trump, artificial intelligence, politics, government
item.dc:creator: Zoë Schiffer, Will Knight
item.dc:subject: Strategic Alignment

item.title: These Democrats Think the Party Needs AI to Win Elections
item.description: The National Democratic Training Committee has made the first official playbook for the use of AI by Democratic campaigns ahead of the midterms.
item.dc:creator: Makena Kelly
item.dc:subject: Midterms

item.title: Want a Different Kind of Work Trip? Try a Robot Hotel
item.description: At Japan’s Henn na Hotels droids pretty much run the show, from greeting you at the door to adjusting the temperature.
item.media:keywords: Travel, robots, The Future of Business Travel, Japan, business
item.dc:creator: Jaclyn Trop, Asumi Nonomiya Suzuki
item.dc:subject: Humanoid Hospitality
